content.story: Maa Shailputri Parvat Raj Himalaya ki putri hain. Ye Navdurga ka pehla roop hain. Inke ek haath mein trishul aur doosre mein kamal hai. Nandi unka vahaan hai.
Maa Brahmacharini tapasya aur sanyam ki devi hain. Inhone Bhagwan Shiv ko pati roop mein paane ke liye hazaaron saal tapasya ki. Ye bhakti aur tyag ka pratik hain.
Maa Chandraghanta ke mastak par aadhe chandra ke aakar ki ghanta hai. Ye saurya aur nidarta ki devi hain. Inki upasana se paap aur sankat door hote hain.
Maa Kushmanda ne apni mandh hasi se brahmand ki rachna ki. 'Ku' ka arth thoda, 'Ushma' arth oorja, 'Anda' arth brahmand. Ye Surya ke andar nivas karti hain.
Maa Skandamata Bhagwan Kartikeya (Skanda) ki mata hain. Ye kamal ke aasan par virajmaan rehti hain. Inki upasana se santan sukh aur moksha milta hai.
Maa Katyayani Maharishi Katyayan ki putri ke roop mein prakat hui. Inhone Mahishasur ka vadh kiya. Vivah mein deri hone par is devi ki puja ki jaati hai.
Maa Kaalratri ka roop atyant bhayanak hai lekin ye shubhankari hain — isliye inhe 'Shubhankari' bhi kaha jaata hai. Ye dusht shaktyon ka naash karti hain.
Maa Mahagauri atyant gauri (gori) hain. Bhagwan Shiv ne inhe Ganga jal se snaan karaya tab ye Mahagauri ban gayin. Ye pavitrta aur shanti ki devi hain.
Maa Siddhidatri sabhi siddhiyan pradan karti hain. Ye kamal par virajmaan rehti hain. Inki kripa se asambhav bhi sambhav ho jaata hai. Swayam Shiv ji ne inse siddhiyan paayi thi.
